reviews.review_description: It's written in another language and it asks you for a code which you. Don't have the key to the code. It's a shame because the music is very soothing.

It may not be worthy your time to download because:

1 -the app home is in Dutch and asks for a key that you don't have.

2- Transaction with them happens outside of the Quest store on their website which is kinda fishy and I've never seen before.

3-The website seems pretty vague and mention to call them with any questions, it does not have any apps being sold separately, they sell Headsets with the app in it and they are over 1k for the cheapest.
